name: Alric Fauxe

the moment he knew
✦

suggested by stardustlight !

「Four years ago, Alric watched as his mentor, Sir Richard Whitlock, claimed a victory that was meant to be his, becoming the Dawnstar’s first Keeper. Undeterred, Alric has trained ever since, determined to prove himself.

Only, he couldn’t quite predict what it might be like to actually meet you in person, after dreaming about you for so long…」
